blocks.text: This book gathers guide chapters from the mods you have loaded. A chapter appears only when its mod is present, so your Almanac always matches your modlist.

items: Press Alt+J to open the book.
Use the tabs to find a mod.
Turn the page to read its chapter.

blocks.text: Write a chapter as plain JSON and ship it in your own mod. The format is documented in the repository. The book owns layout, fonts, and gating. You bring the content.
Keep chapters short. A reader opens the book mid-task and wants the one thing they came for, not an essay.
A chapter is built from blocks. Among them are illustrations and live crafting recipes, both drawn by the book.

blocks.caption: A figure scales to fit the column, caption set beneath it.

blocks.text: A recipe block reuses the handbook's own grid, so it stays correct as the game changes:
